# Article 29 Working Party / EDPB Transparency Guidelines

Jurisdiction: European Union / EEA
Region: EU
Citation: Guidelines on transparency under Regulation 2016/679
Authority: European Data Protection Board
Source URL: https://www.edpb.europa.eu/our-work-tools/our-documents/guidelines/transparency-under-regulation-2016679_en
Topics: notice_transparency, data_subject_rights, children_data, accountability
Keywords: GDPR transparency guidelines, privacy notice, layered notice, clear and plain language

## Summary
EU guidance on transparent information, communication, and modalities for data subject rights under GDPR.

## Key compliance obligations
- Use concise, intelligible, easily accessible privacy information.
- Layer notices for complex processing.
- Tailor child-facing notices to child comprehension.
